name: Optimizely
description: Monitor Optimizely experimentation and feature flag platform for access and change management compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Optimizely at https://app.optimizely.com
2. Go to Account Settings → API Keys
3. Generate a Personal Access Token
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: Personal Access Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Optimizely Account Settings → API Keys

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Optimizely project collaborators with access to experiments and feature flags

checks.name: Code Changes
checks.description: Verifies Optimizely feature flags are used to control code changes safely
